query:
SELECT 
  r.questionId,
  r.response,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM responses r
WHERE r.organizationId = 990001
  AND r.questionId IN ('H.1', 'H.2', 'H.3', 'A.contacts', 'A.6', 'L.2', 'L.3', 'L.4', 'L.8', 'L.9', 'L.10', 'L.11')
GROUP BY r.questionId, r.response
ORDER BY r.questionId;
